data.title: Arkansas TV chooses to drop PBS due to lack of federal funds, facing a tough call to stay in operation.
data.description: The executive director of an Arkansas TV station revealed that due to the loss of federal funding, they faced a challenging choice: either discontinue PBS programming or shut down completely.
China’s vehicle LNG consumption jumps 22% in first nine months of 2025 to 20.27 mln tons, says CNPC research

data.title: ZIEA introduces world's first AI Desktop Calendar to improve focus in age of distraction. Launch announced in San Francisco on Dec. 11, 2025.
data.description: An announcement was made today by ZIEA, a leader in personal productivity hardware based in San Francisco, on December 11, 2025. The company revealed that they will be introducing the ZIEA AI Calendar soon. This device is the first of its kind, intended for desktop use and created to assist individuals in efficiently managing their time. The primary goal of the device is to enable users to better control their schedule and detach from the distractions of the digital world.

data.title: Cadonilimab FDA cleared for Phase III trial in gastric cancer vs. Nivolumab; Akeso initiates COMPASSION-37/AK104-311.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, Akeso, Inc. (9926.HK) revealed that the FDA has granted approval for the commencement of the COMPASSION-37/AK104-311 trial. This global multicenter Phase III trial aims to study cadonilimab, a pioneering PD-1/CTLA-4 bispecific antibody, in the context of gastric cancer. The trial is significant for assessing the efficacy and safety of this innovative treatment approach, marking a major step forward in the field.
Stocks in Asia rise following global benchmark’s new peak

data.title: Blockchain gaming sees rise in stablecoins as studios cut spending, per study. Data reveals shift amid slowing market.
data.description: Recent industry data indicates that developers are increasingly relying on stablecoins and adopting disciplined business strategies as blockchain studios navigate a declining market. The data reveals a growing trend towards stability, with a notable increase in the use of stablecoins and a focus on sustainable business models to weather market fluctuations. This shift highlights the industry's response to current conditions, with a substantial number of developers prioritizing stability and long-term viability in their projects.

data.title: Ecopetrol S.A. announced decisions made at the board meeting on Dec. 10-11, 2025 following resignations of 2 directors.
data.description: Colombian company Ecopetrol S.A. (BVC: ECOPETROL; NYSE: EC) recently disclosed updates arising from its board of directors meeting on December 10 and 11, 2025. The resignations of directors Mónica de Greiff Lindo and Guillermo García were officially recognized during this gathering.

data.title: StreamKey is now representing SJE Rhombus in key markets, providing support in IN, KY, OH, WV, and Western PA.
data.description: New partnership to provide hands-on assistance in Indiana, Kentucky, Ohio, West Virginia, and Western Pennsylvania. SJE Rhombus has selected StreamKey as their new manufacturers' representative for Indiana, excluding Lake and Porter Counties. The collaboration aims to deliver prompt support in these regions. This partnership was revealed on December 11, 2025, in Detroit Lakes, Minnesota.
